allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add Phase 2: Providers and Users Management

New Features:
- Providers CRUD module with search functionality
- Users management with role filtering and password reset
- Enhanced user tracking (created_by, updated_by, password_changed_at)

Backend Changes:
- New API endpoints for providers (/api/providers/admin)
- New API endpoints for users management (/api/users/admin)
- Database schema updates (providers table, users enhancements)

Frontend Changes:
- Providers.js: Complete CRUD interface with search
- Users.js: User management with role filtering, tabs, password reset
- Updated App.js with new routes
- Updated Layout.js with Phase 2 menu items (Proveedores, Usuarios)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
